name: Surfer Dudes Classics Wave Powered Mini-Surfer and Surfboard Toy - Outer Bank Olivia
bullets: Award winning surf toy - Just toss Surfer Dudes into the waves and watch them go! The perfect beach toy for outdoor fun
Worlds first (and only) Surf Boomerang! Patented self righting design means they catch a wave every time and come back to you again and again. The ultimate mini-surfer
NO batteries or wind-up required - uses the energy of the surf. A great gift idea
Multiple Surfer Dudes Classics to choose from! Includes Dude, wing, skeg, fin key, and unsinkable surfboard
